Kinsey (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,214,647Details
International Box Office $7,228,882
Worldwide Box Office $17,443,529
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$169,038 (1.7% of total gross)
Legs:7.90 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:58.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$11,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:5 opening theaters/588 max. theaters, 5.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $18,758,633

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 12th, 2004 (Limited) by Fox Searchlight
International Releases: December 24th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: May 17th, 2005 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for pervasive sexual content, including some graphic images and descriptions
Running Time: 118 minutes
Plot point: Biography, Non-Chronological, Study of Sexuality
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Time period setting: 1920s, 1930s, 1940s, 1950s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Qwerty Films, Fox Searchlight Pictures, European Film Productions, Pretty Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
